countingRule: totalRows must be SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <table>. sourceOriginRows must be SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <table> WHERE <column> LIKE '%<host>%' OR-joined across the sourceBaseUrl hostname and every knownSourceAssetHosts entry, using bare hostnames (so plain-text mentions of the domain count, not only full URLs). The default verifier re-runs exactly these queries via drush sqlq and blocks completion on any mismatch.
evidenceScope: Source-origin dependence measured from stored Drupal fields at import time and re-verified mechanically against the live target at packet time.
